commands.review_summary:
The branch adds visible-chat transcript projection for session history/list previews and adds a WhatsApp group/channel direct final-text fallback in `message_tool_only` mode.

PR surface: Source +154, Tests +219. Total +373 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main shows `sessions_history` only strips tool roles, and the checked-in `message_tool_only` QA scenario proves final text without a message tool call is expected to remain private; I did not run live WhatsApp proof in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the branch has a privacy-sensitive delivery-policy blocker, missing real behavior proof, and a conflicting merge state that automation cannot settle safely.
